🎓 Monarch High School · Coconut Creek, FL

CONGRATULATIONS Jamari Anthony Jacquet

Class of 2026 — graduate, dreamer, and future software developer. The tassel turned. The journey begins.

Future Ahead
The Moment

From the stage at Monarch
to whatever comes next.

Jamari walked across that stage in Fort Lauderdale and closed one of the proudest chapters a family can witness. Cap. Gown. Diploma in hand. Class of 2026.

But anyone who knows him knows this isn't a finish line — it's a launch. He's got a builder's mind and his eyes are already on the next thing: writing code, shipping ideas, and turning the ordinary into the extraordinary.

Where he's headed →
Why it matters

Three things this diploma proves

🧭

He finished what he started

Thirteen years, every early morning, every late assignment — done. That kind of follow-through is the whole game.

💡

He thinks like a builder

Jamari doesn't just use technology — he's curious about how it works and how to make it himself. That's the developer mindset.

🚀

He's just getting started

A diploma is a key, not a destination. The most exciting code he'll ever write hasn't been written yet.

The Next Chapter

Cap & gown today.
Code tomorrow.

He told the family he's into programming. So we ran the numbers.

jamari@future ~ %
